---
title: "Data Viz"
editor: visual
---



```{r}
morning_otp_by_line <- 
  read_csv("/Users/greg.morton/Documents/baltimoreBanner/Projects/2024/high_school_transportation_otp/data/output/morning_otp_by_line_01_16.csv") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(on_time_perc)) 

most_popular_routes <- 
  read_csv("data/output/most_popular_routes_01-17.csv")

```

```{r}
most_popular_routes %>% 
  left_join(morning_otp_by_line, by = c("name" = "route_name")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(n_days)) %>% 
 dplyr::select(
    name,
    short_name,
    total_students,
    on_time_perc,
    on_time_perc_5,
    mean_headway,
    color
  ) %>% 
  mutate(color = str_c("#", color)) %>% 
  View()
  

```
